en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: langay mikake na kopo, walangalangay nyamo?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.
B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.
A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: mwa pasopaa nakoa longay na baothotho.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?
A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: langay mikae na tangaavane ’angidrosa na ébeke.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: nakay ka ’atedranga ’atoo na ébeke, ko ’angico’olo mosoa bwa’ay!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: kikay thobongo bebe’ase ka piyani na payso?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: sesesane na thobongo ka drosa na iday.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: ’angico’olo ka maposale sika saseane na payso, ’akamaposala ka mwebate.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: nakay ka mavangate sika ima na payso.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: ko langayla ’angititiici, paebate sesesane na iday.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: ’angico’olo ka ima na iday sila’amangesale na payso.
en: A:All $510.
B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.
A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: kikay pinkange ka matoolo na payso, alrala myaso ’ielane na ma’akakoanga?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
